title: The Life of Emile Zola
writer: Norman Reilly Raine, Heinz Herald, Geza Herczeg
actors: Paul Muni, Gale Sondergaard, Joseph Schildkraut
plot: The biopic of the famous French muckraking writer and his involvement in fighting the injustice of the Dreyfus Affair, a Jewish army officer who is accused of treason.
